attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.SETUP_HDR_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.PROJECT_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.QUOTE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.QUOTE_COST_BUDGET, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.DEL_START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.DEL_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.PROCESS_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.OP_ADM_PRG_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.FIRST_QUOTE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.QUOTE_BOOK_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.ORIG_CONTRACT_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.SO_CR_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.SO_CR_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.UPDATE_ALLOWED, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.QUOTE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.QUOTE_CURRENCY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.ADM_WBS_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.NET_MARGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.FLEX_MULTIPLIER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.AS_SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR,
 (
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR
 minus
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SETUP_HDR)
